hooks.command: if [ ! -d /Volumes/ICONOCRACIA ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"SSD externo ICONOCRACIA nao montado. Symlinks em data/raw/ nao funcionarao."}'; else count=$(jq '.items | length' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/corpus/corpus-data.json" 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"SSD montado. Corpus: $count itens.\"}"; fi

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'tese/manuscrito/(Capitulo|Introducao|sumario).*_original' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Arquivo original do manuscrito protegido. Use vault/tese/ para rascunhos revisados."}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'vault/candidatos/' && basename "$f" | grep -qvE '^[A-Z]{2}-[0-9]{3} ' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Vault note must follow pattern: CC-NNN Description.md (e.g. FR-013 Marianne.md)"}'; } || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q vault/candidatos/SCOUT- && echo "Vault note saved: $(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")" || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'vault/candidatos/.*\.md$' && cd /Users/ana/iconocracy-corpus && git add "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q corpus/corpus-data.json && conda run -n iconocracy python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tools/scripts/validate_schemas.py" --quiet 2>&1 | tail -3 || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q corpus/corpus-data.json && conda run -n iconocracy python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tools/scripts/code_purification.py" --export-csv 2>&1 | tail -1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'corpus-data.json' && count=$(jq '.items | length' /Users/ana/iconocracy-corpus/corpus/corpus-data.json 2>/dev/null) && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Corpus now has $count items.\"}}"; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'tese/manuscrito/.*\.md$' && wc -w < "$f" | { read -r w; echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Chapter word count: $w words\"}"; }; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '(tools/scripts|notebooks|iconocracy-ingest)/.*\.py$' && ruff check --quiet "$f" 2>&1 | head -10; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.sh$' && shellcheck "$f" 2>&1 | head -10; } || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'tese/manuscrito/.*\.md$' && echo "Thesis chapter edited: $(basename $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH). Consider running /abnt-checker and /chapter-integrity." || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: Preserve any corpus item IDs (e.g. FR-013, BR-001), Iconclass codes, endurecimento scores, and vault note paths discussed in this session. Also preserve the current state of any ongoing SCOUT campaigns."}}'
